summary: Soundboard recording marred by loud static during “Eyes of the World”, but listeners still love the performance.
review: The show is praised by fans for its musical quality, yet the soundboard source suffers a major defect – about 40 seconds of loud static in the middle of “Eyes of the World”. This technical flaw drives the overall rating down despite the underlying strength of the concert.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review gives a low (2‑star) rating due to serious recording problems, while also expressing love for the show; another provides no substantive feedback. The weighted combination of modest show appreciation and poor audio quality yields an overall low‑mid rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Loud static lasting ~40 seconds during “Eyes of the World” (around 8:30 into the track); otherwise no further comments on clarity or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific commentary on set pacing or transitions.
